languages.text: [Протянуть дневник] "Он был псайкером, которого Ведка пыталась заставить отослать астропатическое сообщение".
[Hand over the journal] "He was a psyker. Vedka was trying to get him to send an Astropathic message."
languages.original_text: [Протянуть дневник] "Он был псайкером, которого Ведка пыталась заставить отослать астропатическое сообщение".

traits.locale_text: [Hand over the journal] "He was a psyker. Vedka was trying to get him to send an Astropathic message."
[Hand over the journal] "He was a psyker. Vedka was trying to get him to send an Astropathic message."

[Hand over the journal] "He was a psyker. Vedka was trying to get him to send an Astropathic message."

languages.text: 【递出日志】“他是个灵能者。薇德卡当时想让他发送一条星语信息。”
languages.original_text: [Hand over the journal] "He was a psyker. Vedka was trying to get him to send an Astropathic message."

traits.locale_text: 【递出日志】“他是个灵能者。薇德卡当时想让他发送一条星语信息。”

languages.text: [Günlüğü ver] "Ceset bir ruhsezerin. Vedka onu Astropatik bir mesaj göndermeye zorluyormuş."
languages.original_text: [Hand over the journal] "He was a psyker. Vedka was trying to get him to send an Astropathic message."

traits.locale_text: [Günlüğü ver] "Ceset bir ruhsezerin. Vedka onu Astropatik bir mesaj göndermeye zorluyormuş."

languages.text: [Donner le journal] « C'était un psyker. Vedka essayait de lui apprendre à envoyer un message astropathique. »
languages.original_text: [Hand over the journal] "He was a psyker. Vedka was trying to get him to send an Astropathic message."

traits.locale_text: [Donner le journal] « C'était un psyker. Vedka essayait de lui apprendre à envoyer un message astropathique. »

languages.text: [Entregar el diario] «Era un psíquico. Vedka estaba intentando que enviara un mensaje Astropático».
languages.original_text: [Hand over the journal] "He was a psyker. Vedka was trying to get him to send an Astropathic message."

traits.locale_text: [Entregar el diario] «Era un psíquico. Vedka estaba intentando que enviara un mensaje Astropático».

languages.text: [Das Tagebuch übergeben] "Er war ein Psioniker. Vedka wollte ihn dazu bringen, eine astropathische Nachricht zu senden."
languages.original_text: [Hand over the journal] "He was a psyker. Vedka was trying to get him to send an Astropathic message."

traits.locale_text: [Das Tagebuch übergeben] "Er war ein Psioniker. Vedka wollte ihn dazu bringen, eine astropathische Nachricht zu senden."

languages.text: [日記を渡す] 「彼はサイカーだった。ヴェドカは彼にアストロパシーのメッセージを送るようにしていた」
languages.original_text: [Hand over the journal] "He was a psyker. Vedka was trying to get him to send an Astropathic message."

traits.locale_text: [日記を渡す] 「彼はサイカーだった。ヴェドカは彼にアストロパシーのメッセージを送るようにしていた」
